description: CarePlus Hospital is a state-of-the-art multi-speciality healthcare facility in Bangalore with 200+ beds, advanced diagnostic technology, and a team of 50+ highly qualified doctors. We offer comprehensive medical services across cardiology, orthopaedics, neurology, paediatrics, gynaecology, emergency care, and more. At CarePlus, every patient receives personalised treatment in a warm, healing environment.
address: No. 88, 100 Feet Road, Indiranagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560038

services.title: Cardiology
services.description: Comprehensive heart care including angioplasty, bypass surgery, and preventive cardiology with state-of-the-art cath lab.

services.title: Orthopaedics
services.description: Expert care for bone, joint, and spine conditions including knee replacements, sports injuries, and trauma surgery.

services.title: Paediatrics
services.description: Specialised medical care for newborns, children, and adolescents with a dedicated paediatric ICU.

services.title: Gynaecology
services.description: Complete women's health services from routine check-ups to high-risk pregnancy management and minimally invasive surgeries.

services.title: Emergency Medicine
services.description: 24/7 emergency department with rapid response trauma team, fully equipped ambulances, and golden-hour protocols.

services.title: Neurology
services.description: Advanced diagnostics and treatment for neurological disorders including stroke management, epilepsy care, and neurosurgery.

reviews.name: Suresh K.
reviews.text: Excellent hospital with very caring staff. My father's knee replacement was smooth and recovery was faster than expected.

reviews.name: Meena R.
reviews.text: The paediatric team was wonderful with my 3-year-old. The NICU facilities gave us so much peace of mind.

reviews.name: Vikram P.
reviews.text: Came in with chest pain at 2 AM and was seen immediately. Fast response, thorough diagnosis. Very grateful.

team.name: Dr. Arjun Nair
team.description: MD, DM (Cardiology), 18+ years experience. Trained at AIIMS and Cleveland Clinic.

team.name: Dr. Lakshmi Iyer
team.description: MS (Ortho), DNB, 15+ years experience. Specialises in minimally invasive knee and hip replacements.

team.name: Dr. Rajesh Kumar
team.description: MD (Emergency Medicine), 12+ years experience. Former lead at Narayana Health emergency unit.

team.name: Dr. Priya Menon
team.description: MD (OBG), MRCOG (UK), 14+ years experience. Expert in minimally invasive gynaecological procedures.

team.name: Dr. Sanjay Verma
team.description: MD, DM (Neurology), 16+ years experience. Pioneer in stroke thrombolysis protocols in Karnataka.

faq.a: Yes, CarePlus is open 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. Our emergency department is always staffed and ready.

faq.q: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a: You can book online through our website, call us directly, or visit the hospital's OPD reception between 8 AM and 8 PM.

faq.q: Does insurance cover treatments at CarePlus?
faq.a: We are empanelled with all major insurance providers and TPA networks. Our insurance desk will assist you with cashless claims.

faq.q: Do you offer home healthcare services?
faq.a: Yes, we provide nursing care, physiotherapy, and lab sample collection at home. Call our helpline for details.

faq.q: Is there a pharmacy on campus?
faq.a: Our 24-hour pharmacy is located on the ground floor with most prescription and OTC medicines in stock.
